narrative:
Columbiana City has 4,880 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
